name: bayan
description: Bayan (بيان) by Tabayn — multi-tenant SaaS platform for building business websites

scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,backend,frontend -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=@bayan/shared" "npm run start:dev --workspace=@bayan/backend" "npm run dev --workspace=@bayan/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@bayan/shared && npm run build --workspace=@bayan/backend && npm run build --workspace=@bayan/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=@bayan/backend && npm run lint --workspace=@bayan/frontend
